title: Angular Portfolio SPA
description: Single Page Application built with Angular to showcase engineering and software projects using a modular, component-based architecture.
contributions: Built SPA architecture using Angular routing and modular components
Implemented reactive data flow using Observables and async pipe
Designed reusable UI system for dynamic project rendering
impact: Unified engineering and software projects into a single portfolio platform

title: Motion Control Testing System
description: Desktop applications for industrial motion control testing and validation systems in production environments.
contributions: Developed WPF/WinForms applications for industrial test benches
Implemented automated testing workflows and data processing pipelines
Managed structured file-based data storage (JSON, Excel) for test results
Supported production tooling and debugging of critical issues
impact: Enabled execution of 10+ automated tests per day
Supported validation pipeline enabling shipment of 100+ industrial products

title: Production Line Automation System
description: PLC-based automation system for industrial production lines with integrated control and HMI interfaces.
contributions: Developed PLC control logic for production automation systems
Designed HMI interfaces for operator monitoring and interaction
Implemented PLC communication with external data systems via TwinCAT 3
Integrated control logic into industrial production workflows
impact: Enabled production of 100+ units across multiple work orders
Supported deployment of new product types in industrial production line

title: CERN Control & Real-Time Systems
description: Development of control, data acquisition and experimental systems for scientific and accelerator infrastructure.
contributions: Developed PLC-based control systems for accelerator infrastructure
Built real-time data acquisition systems for superconducting magnet testing using LabVIEW
Developed embedded C/C++ systems for sensor calibration and robotic applications
Created PHP-based scripts for database interaction and experimental data management
Supported scientific data processing and system integration across multiple subsystems
impact: Contributed to scientific infrastructure used in particle accelerator experiments
Supported validation of superconducting magnet and experimental systems
